code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let t_raw = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let t = string.trim(t_raw)
  let body = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(body)
  mut count = 0
  mut token = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(body, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        if token == t
          count = count + 1
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(token)
    if token == t
      count = count + 1
    end
  end
  println("count=#{count}")
end
